languages.text: "Протокол 12.70 дробь четыре!" {n}Ржаволовчие моментально переводят лучи визоров на нечто за вашей спиной.{/n} "Объединить усилия с {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольным Торговцем{/g}! Защищать периметр, пока я не разберусь с Объектом 16!"

traits.locale_text: "Протокол 12.70 дробь четыре!" {n}Ржаволовчие моментально переводят лучи визоров на нечто за вашей спиной.{/n} "Объединить усилия с {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольным Торговцем{/g}! Защищать периметр, пока я не разберусь с Объектом 16!"

languages.text: "Protocol 12.70 dash 4!" {n}The Ruststalkers instantly shift their visor beams to focus on something over your shoulder.{/n} "Join forces with the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}! Defend the perimeter until I have dealt with Object 16!"
languages.original_text: "Протокол 12.70 дробь четыре!" {n}Ржаволовчие моментально переводят лучи визоров на нечто за вашей спиной.{/n} "Объединить усилия с {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольным Торговцем{/g}! Защищать периметр, пока я не разберусь с Объектом 16!"

traits.locale_text: "Protocol 12.70 dash 4!" {n}The Ruststalkers instantly shift their visor beams to focus on something over your shoulder.{/n} "Join forces with the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}! Defend the perimeter until I have dealt with Object 16!"

"Protocol 12.70 dash 4!" {n}The Ruststalkers instantly shift their visor beams to focus on something over your shoulder.{/n} "Join forces with the Rogue Trader! Defend the perimeter until I have dealt with Object 16!"

"Protocol 12.70 dash 4!" {n}The Ruststalkers instantly shift their visor beams to focus on something over your shoulder.{/n} "Join forces with the Rogue Trader! Defend the perimeter until I have dealt with Object 16!"

languages.text: 「プロトコル12.70-4！」{n}ラスターストーカーは瞬時に視界のビームをあなたの肩の後ろに焦点を当てた。{/n}「ローグトレーダーと力を合わせろ！16号物体と私は済ませるまで、周囲を守れ！」
languages.original_text: "Protocol 12.70 dash 4!" {n}The Ruststalkers instantly shift their visor beams to focus on something over your shoulder.{/n} "Join forces with the Rogue Trader! Defend the perimeter until I have dealt with Object 16!"

traits.locale_text: 「プロトコル12.70-4！」{n}ラスターストーカーは瞬時に視界のビームをあなたの肩の後ろに焦点を当てた。{n}「ローグトレーダーと力を合わせろ！16号物体と私は済ませるまで、周囲を守れ！」

languages.text: «¡Protocolo 12.70 guion 4!». {n}Los ferracechadores inmediatamente dirigen sus haces visores hacia algo por encima de tu hombro.{/n} «¡Cooperen con {mf|el|la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g}! ¡Defiendan el perímetro hasta que me ocupe del Objeto 16!».
languages.original_text: "Protocol 12.70 dash 4!" {n}The Ruststalkers instantly shift their visor beams to focus on something over your shoulder.{/n} "Join forces with the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}! Defend the perimeter until I have dealt with Object 16!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Protocolo 12.70 guion 4!». {n}Los ferracechadores inmediatamente dirigen sus haces visores hacia algo por encima de tu hombro.{/n} «¡Cooperen con {mf|el|la} {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g}! ¡Defiendan el perímetro hasta que me ocupe del Objeto 16!».

languages.text: “12.70-4协议！”{n}锈色追踪者的目镜光束瞬间转向，聚焦于你身后的某物。{/n}“与{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}协同！在我处理完16号目标之前，务必坚守防线！”
languages.original_text: "Protocol 12.70 dash 4!" {n}The Ruststalkers instantly shift their visor beams to focus on something over your shoulder.{/n} "Join forces with the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}! Defend the perimeter until I have dealt with Object 16!"

traits.locale_text: “12.70-4协议！”{n}锈色追踪者的目镜光束瞬间转向，聚焦于你身后的某物。{/n}“与{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}协同！在我处理完16号目标之前，务必坚守防线！”

languages.text: "Protokoll 12.70, Strich 4!" {n}Die Rostpirscher justieren umgehend ihre Visorstrahlen und peilen ein Ziel über deine Schulter an.{/n} "Schließt Euch {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin}{/g} an! Verteidigt den Perimeter, bis ich mich um Objekt 16 gekümmert habe!"
languages.original_text: "Protocol 12.70 dash 4!" {n}The Ruststalkers instantly shift their visor beams to focus on something over your shoulder.{/n} "Join forces with the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}! Defend the perimeter until I have dealt with Object 16!"

traits.locale_text: "Protokoll 12.70, Strich 4!" {n}Die Rostpirscher justieren umgehend ihre Visorstrahlen und peilen ein Ziel über deine Schulter an.{/n} "Schließt Euch {mf|dem {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Freihändler{/g}|der Freihändlerin} an! Verteidigt den Perimeter, bis ich mich um Objekt 16 gekümmert habe!"

languages.text: "Protokol 12.70 tire 4!" {n}Pasavcısı güruhu, vizör ışınlarını anında omzunuzun üzerinden bir şeye odaklıyor.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g} ile güçlerinizi birleştirin! Ben Nesne 16 ile ilgilenene kadar çevreyi savunun!"
languages.original_text: "Protocol 12.70 dash 4!" {n}The Ruststalkers instantly shift their visor beams to focus on something over your shoulder.{/n} "Join forces with the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}! Defend the perimeter until I have dealt with Object 16!"

traits.locale_text: "Protokol 12.70 tire 4!" {n}Pasavcısı güruhu, vizör ışınlarını anında omzunuzun üzerinden bir şeye odaklıyor.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g} ile güçlerinizi birleştirin! Ben Nesne 16 ile ilgilenene kadar çevreyi savunun!"

languages.text: « Protocole 12.70 tiret 4 ! » {n}Les corrôdeurs pointent immédiatement les faisceaux de leurs armes vers quelque chose derrière vous.{/n} « Joignez vos forces à celles {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}{/g} ! Défendez le périmètre jusqu'à la destruction de l'objet 16 ! »
languages.original_text: "Protocol 12.70 dash 4!" {n}The Ruststalkers instantly shift their visor beams to focus on something over your shoulder.{/n} "Join forces with the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}! Defend the perimeter until I have dealt with Object 16!"
